title: Imperial Guard Omnibus: Volume One / Shield of the Emperor

curation.synopsis: This omnibus gathers the first three Imperial Guard novels, each paired with a companion short story, into a single volume about the lives of the Emperor's ordinary soldiers. Fifteen Hours follows a green conscript dropped into the decade-long siege of Broucheroc against the Orks. Death World sends a squad of Catachan Jungle Fighters onto a planet whose every plant and beast has turned predator. Rebel Winter strands a Vostroyan company behind enemy lines on an ice world torn by rebellion and greenskin raiders. Together the stories trace one consistent theme: not the heroics of the mighty, but the endurance, dread and grim camaraderie of the men who hold the Imperium's front lines.

collects.basis: Imperial Guard omnibus Volume One follows the first three listed novels
